NKJV.1: A Song of Ascents. Of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is For brethren to dwell together in unity!
NKJV.2: It is like the precious oil upon the head, Running down on the beard, The beard of Aaron, Running down on the edge of his garments.
NKJV.3: It is like the dew of Hermon, Descending upon the mountains of Zion; For there the LORD commanded the blessing— Life forevermore.

KJV.1: A Song<S>7892</S> of degrees<S>4609</S> of David<S>1732</S>. Behold, how good<S>2896</S> and how pleasant<S>5273</S> it is for brethren<S>251</S> to dwell<S>3427</S> together<S>3162</S> in unity<S>3162</S>! <sup>together: Heb. even together</sup>
KJV.2: It is like the precious<S>2896</S> ointment<S>8081</S> upon the head<S>7218</S>, that ran down<S>3381</S> upon the beard<S>2206</S>, even Aaron's<S>175</S> beard<S>2206</S>: that went down<S>3381</S> to the skirts<S>6310</S> of his garments<S>4060</S>;

ESV.1: Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers dwell in unity!
ESV.2: It is like the precious oil on the head, running down on the beard, on the beard of Aaron, running down on the collar of his robes!
ESV.3: It is like the dew of Hermon, which falls on the mountains of Zion! For there the LORD has commanded the blessing, life forevermore.

NASB.1: A Song of Ascents, of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is For brothers to dwell together in unity!
NASB.2: It is like the precious oil upon the head, Coming down upon the beard, [Even] Aaron's beard, Coming down upon the edge of his robes.
NASB.3: It is like the dew of Hermon Coming down upon the mountains of Zion; For there the LORD commanded the blessing-- life forever.

NLT.1:
How wonderful and pleasant it is
when brothers live together in harmony!
NLT.2:
For harmony is as precious as the anointing oil
that was poured over Aaron’s head,
that ran down his beard
and onto the border of his robe.
NLT.3:
Harmony is as refreshing as the dew from Mount Hermon
that falls on the mountains of Zion.
And there the LORD has pronounced his blessing,
even life everlasting.

WEB.1: A Song of Ascents. By David. See how good and how pleasant it is for brothers to live together in unity!
WEB.2: It is like the precious oil on the head, that ran down on the beard, even Aaron’s beard; that came down on the edge of his robes;
WEB.3: like the dew of Hermon, that comes down on the hills of Zion: for there Yahweh gives the blessing, even life forever more.

CSB17.1:
A song of ascents. Of David. [1] How good and pleasant it is
when brothers live together in harmony! ⓒ
CSB17.2:
It is like fine oil on the head,
running down on the beard,
running down Aaron’s beard
onto his robes. ⓓ
CSB17.3:
It is like the dew of Hermon [1]
falling on the mountains of Zion. ⓔ
For there the LORD has appointed the blessing —
life forevermore. ⓕ

AMP.1:
A Song of Ascents. Of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is
For brothers to dwell together in unity!
AMP.2:
It is like the precious oil [of consecration] poured on the head,
Coming down on the beard,
Even the beard of Aaron,
Coming down upon the edge of his [priestly] robes [consecrating the whole body].
AMP.3:
It is like the dew of [Mount] Hermon
Coming down on the hills of Zion;
For there the LORD has commanded the blessing: life forevermore.

MSG.1:
A pilgrim song of David
How wonderful, how beautiful,
when brothers and sisters get along!
MSG.2:
It's like costly anointing oil
flowing down head and beard,
Flowing down Aaron's beard,
flowing down the collar of his priestly robes.
MSG.3:
It's like the dew on Mount Hermon
flowing down the slopes of Zion.
Yes, that's where God commands the blessing,
ordains eternal life.

NIV.1:
Psalm 133
A song of ascents. Of David.
How good and pleasant it is
when brothers live together in unity!
NIV.2:
It is like precious oil poured on the head,
running down on the beard,
running down on Aaron’s beard,
down upon the collar of his robes.
NIV.3:
It is as if the dew of Hermon
were falling on Mount Zion.
For there the Lord bestows his blessing,
even life forevermore.

NRSVCE.1:
How very good and pleasant it is
when kindred live together in unity!
NRSVCE.2:
It is like the precious oil on the head,
running down upon the beard,
on the beard of Aaron,
running down over the collar of his robes.
NRSVCE.3:
It is like the dew of Hermon,
which falls on the mountains of Zion.
For there the LORD ordained his blessing,
life forevermore.

NET.1: Look! How good and how pleasant it is when brothers live together!
NET.2: It is like fine oil poured on the head which flows down the beard — Aaron’s beard, and then flows down his garments.
NET.3: It is like the dew of Hermon, which flows down upon the hills of Zion. Indeed that is where the LORD has decreed a blessing will be available — eternal life.
